package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for gzip_or_zip_writer_created_per_chunk: Gzip or zip writers recreated per chunk inside handler loops instead of reusing per stream.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule318NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule318NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule318NegativeRecord) (Rule318NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario318Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule318NegativeService, input Rule318NegativeRecord) (Rule318NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule318NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
